title: fauria crista-galli subsp. japonica
intro: Fauria crista-galli subsp. japonica, also known as Japanese Fauria, is a rare and endangered alpine plant species native to Japan. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Fauria crista-galli subsp. japonica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
